business.name: M L Scarbary Plumbing Co
business.tagline: When pipes break, Macon calls Mack

hero.headline: Macon's *A-1 Plumber* — Ask Around
hero.subheadline: Customers wait a week for Mack rather than settle for someone else. That's the difference quality makes.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Pipe Problems Fixed Right
services_section.subheading: From busted water lines to tricky repairs — handled with skill and a fair price

services.title: Water Line Repairs
services.description: Busted PCV pipes, main line breaks, and underground leaks. We dig, fix, and restore your water flow without the runaround.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: When water's going where it shouldn't, time matters. Quick response to stop the damage and get things flowing again.

services.title: Pipe Installations
services.description: New construction, additions, or full replacements. Quality materials installed right the first time with honest pricing.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Hidden leaks waste money and cause damage. We find them fast and fix them permanently with minimal disruption.

about.heading: Mack Scarbary — Macon's Go-To Plumber
about.body: M L Scarbary Plumbing Co brings old-school craftsmanship to Macon's toughest plumbing challenges. When other plumbers can't figure it out, they call Mack. Known throughout Macon for fair pricing, quick work, and repairs that last.

reviews.name: Brandon O.
reviews.text: Mack is an A-1 plumber — the best I've ever met. I'd rather wait a week for him than settle for someone else. You won't be disappointed.

reviews.name: Ron L.
reviews.text: Great guy who gets the job done and gives you a fair price every time.

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: Outstanding company! Fixed our busted water PCV pipe with a great attitude and more than fair pricing.

cta.heading: Ready for Honest Plumbing Work?
cta.body: Join the customers who won't call anyone else. Fair pricing, quality repairs, and service that's worth the wait.
